<!--
Thanks for contributing!

Checklist before opening:
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (Chromium + WebKit + Firefox)
- [ ] `pnpm test:types` passes if you touched cider.d.ts or its API
- [ ] `pnpm build` output (js/cider.js, dist/*) is committed if you
      touched js/components/ or src/css/
- [ ] A new component added both `docs/components/<name>.njk` and
      `tests/<name>.spec.js`, and an entry in `docs/_data/nav.json`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under [Unreleased]
-->

## Summary

What changes, and why.

## Screenshots (for visual changes)

Before / after. Light mode + dark mode if applicable.
